MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jessica Chylik, Esq., 415-863-5718 for defendant and moving party Marlene Jung
David Marcolini, Esq., 415-568-0742 specially appearing for plaintiff and opposing party DCFS USA

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT MARLENE JUNG'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
